name: David K.
headline: Industry Career Acceleration
quote: Sky States provided the exact architectural depth and white-glove negotiation coaching needed to jump from legacy systems engineer to an AWS Cloud Architect. The salary uplift was instant, but the career trajectory shift was priceless.

name: Sarah J.
headline: Transitioning to GenAI Lead
quote: The hands-on labs on Large Language Models and model serving pipelines gave me the confidence to ace interviews at top scale-ups. I received three offers within a month of completing the program.

name: Raj P.
headline: Scale and Infrastructure Mastery
quote: I learned how to construct fully automated, self-healing architectures under production load. The mentorship and mock interview drills helped me stand out from other candidates.
